enableBackgroundWarmup.description: When true, pipelines from knownModelGraphs are pre-compiled on background threads at cache init.

maxWarmupPipelines.description: Maximum number of pipelines to warm up in a single session.

warmupWorkerCount.description: Number of background threads used for pipeline warmup.

graphId.description: Stable identifier for a model graph whose pipelines should be warmed.

pipelineKeys.description: Hex cache keys of pipelines belonging to this graph.

knownModelGraphs.description: Model graphs whose pipelines are candidates for background warmup.
